zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord John Hesketh of Rufford於大約1276年出生在英國藍卡爾盧福德時，他的父親Sir William de Hesketh II30歲，母親Matilda Fitton28歲。他和Alice de Radcliffe至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1334年在英國爾加福斯沃斯享年59歲。

zh-hans.Rishton, Lancashire, England, United Kin: 英国英格兰藍卡爾利申頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord John Hesketh of Rufford于大约1276年出生在英国藍卡爾盧福德时，他的父亲Sir William de Hesketh II30岁，母亲Matilda Fitton28岁。他和Alice de Radcliffe至少有1个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1334年在英国爾加福斯沃斯享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hesketh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire): habitational name from Hesketh (Lancashire), Hesketh Grange in Felixkirk (North Yorkshire), or Hesket in the Forest (Cumberland). The placenames derive from Old Norse hestr ‘horse, stallion’ + skeith ‘course, track, race course’. The ancient Scandinavians were fond of horse-racing and horse-fighting, and introduced both pastimes to England.

variants.name: Heskett
meanings: English (Cumberland and Lancashire): variant of   Hesketh  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord John Hesketh of Rufford was born about 1276, in Rufford, Lancashire, England, his father, Sir William de Hesketh II, was 30 and his mother, Matilda Fitton, was 28. He had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Alice de Radcliffe. He died in 1334, in Gawsworth, Cheshire, England, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord John Hesketh of Rufford est né environ 1276, à Rufford, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William de Hesketh II, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Matilda Fitton, avait 28 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Alice de Radcliffe. Il est décédé en 1334, à Gawsworth, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord John Hesketh of Rufford um 1276 in Rufford, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William de Hesketh II 30 und seine Mutter Matilda Fitton 28. Er hatte mit Alice de Radcliffe mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1334 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Gawsworth, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord John Hesketh of Rufford è nato il circa 1276 nel Rufford, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Sir William de Hesketh II, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Matilda Fitton, aveva 28 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie con Alice de Radcliffe. Morì nel 1334, nel Gawsworth, Cheshire, England, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord John Hesketh of Ruffordが約1276年にイギリスランカシュアイアルフォードで生まれた時，父Sir William de Hesketh IIは30歳，母Matilda Fittonは28歳であった。彼はAlice de Radcliffeとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1334年にイギリスチェシュアイアガウスウオルスで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord John Hesketh of Rufford(이)가 대략 1276년 영국 랭카실르 루퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William de Hesketh II(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda Fitton(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Alice de Radcliffe(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1334년 영국 체실르 가w스워스에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord John Hesketh of Rufford nasceu aproximadamente 1276, em Rufford, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William de Hesketh II, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Matilda Fitton, tinha 28 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas com Alice de Radcliffe. Ele faleceu em 1334, em Gawsworth, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord John Hesketh of Rufford родился около 1276 г. в местности руффорд, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William de Hesketh II было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda Fitton, 28. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от Alice de Radcliffe. Он умер в 1334 г. в местности гавсворт, чешир, Англия в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord John Hesketh of Rufford nació aproximadamente 1276, en Rufford, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William de Hesketh II, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Matilda Fitton, tenía 28 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas con Alice de Radcliffe. Murió en 1334, en Gawsworth, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años.
